##NAMES=Goethite
##RRUFFID=R120086
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=FeO(OH)
##LOCALITY=Alexander mine, Vrancice, Příbram, Central Bohemia Region, Bohemia, Czech Republic
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Elongated black crystals, associated with R070363, čechite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R120086
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 4.6012 b: 9.961 c: 3.0218 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 138.49 crystal system: orthorhombic
##FILETYPE=RAW Powder Diffraction Profile
